name: paperclip
title: Paperclip
description: Search Paperclip issues and open them in the web app.
author: istib

commands.name: search-issues
commands.title: Search Issues
commands.description: Search Paperclip issues and open them in the browser

commands.name: review-blocked-issues
commands.title: Show Review or Blocked Issues
commands.description: Jump directly to issues that are in review or blocked

commands.name: create-issue
commands.title: Create Issue
commands.description: Open a form to create a new Paperclip issue

preferences.name: apiBaseUrl
preferences.title: Paperclip Base URL
preferences.description: Base URL of your Paperclip server, for example http://127.0.0.1:3100

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: Bearer Token
preferences.description: Used when Auth Mode is set to Bearer Token

preferences.name: customAuthHeaderName
preferences.title: Custom Header Name
preferences.description: Used when Auth Mode is set to Custom Header

preferences.name: customAuthHeaderValue
preferences.title: Custom Header Value
preferences.description: Used when Auth Mode is set to Custom Header
